Short CV

Instructor Aybike PİROL was born in 1994. Having completed her undergraduate education in Çukurova University, Department of Biomedical Engineering in 2017, PİROL completed her master's degree in Biomedical Engineering at Çukurova University in 2021. Currently, Aybike PİROL is working as an Instructor in the Health Services Vocational School Biomedical Device Technology Program.
